item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-loaded-action-v0.2","default_disposition":"refuse_next_local_repair","refusal":"Refuse another repair-only release exception as the default next move. A fourth local sign-off would keep the beacon repair moving while leaving release authority unresolved.","mechanism_reframe":"The repeated mechanism is a governance bypass: when the service ledger is unavailable, the team substitutes local sign-off cards, but the unresolved question of who may release a repaired beacon returns after each repair. The urgent king-tide context is real, but it does not make the local workaround a stable release mechanism.","upstream_next_action":"Move the decision upstream: the harbor authority must close and own the repaired-beacon release authority decision before this release proceeds through the normal path.","requested_patch_delivery":null,"bounded_emergency":null}
